testsuite.name: CreateCustomerAndSession.createCustomerAndCreateSession

testcase.name: createSession
testcase.system-out: Status = Pass CardNumber = 4111111111111111 CVV = 123 RunFlag = TRUE TestData = IN RouteToMidOrBank = panatics-mid PSP = paynetics MaxAmount = 100 CardholderName = Yash Bahubali Merchant = SuhasM RouteToBankMid = Route to Mid Currency = EUR MinAmount = 10 DefaultAmount = 13.6 PaymentMethod = Visa Expiry = 10/27 select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- EUR select merchant name :- Visa Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 13.6 ✅ Amount within valid range. Using exact value: 13.6 { "sessionUrl": "https://test4.paymentsclub.net/payment-session/69898d01ca0b1ef32d4a25f3/", "brandId": "04199342-5d84-4e17-a53e-5c3d6b03ebd4", "customerId": "69898cd0ca0b1ef32d4a25b4", "sessionId": "69898d01ca0b1ef32d4a25f3", "expiryOn": 1770623109, "createdOn": 1770622209 } Entered Card Holder Name: Yash Bahubali Entered Card Number: 4111111111111111 Entered Card Expiry Date: 10/27 Entered Card CVV: 123 Moved to the Pay button Clicked on the Pay button to proceed with payment Clicked on ZaakPay submit button on bank page Redirect URL → https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true Payment succeeded Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 69898d01ca0b1ef32d4a25f3 Clicked on Search button Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null

testcase.name: createCustomer
testcase.system-out: Generated Merchant Customer ID: Z409 Generated First Name: john3ab Generated Email: nairobiPalermo78cdf@gmail.com Generated Indian Mobile Number: 9240784800 { "customerId": "69898cd0ca0b1ef32d4a25b4", "merchantCustomerId": "Z409", "fullName": "john3ab", "emailId": "nairobipalermo78cdf@gmail.com", "phoneNo": "9240784800", "city": "juneau", "zipCode": "99812", "country": "IN", "stateCode": "MH", "successTrans": 0, "createdOn": 1770622160, "lastUpdated": 0, "lastActivity": 1770622160 } Customer created successfully → 69898cd0ca0b1ef32d4a25b4

testsuite.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Generated Merchant Customer ID: Z409 Generated First Name: john3ab Generated Email: nairobiPalermo78cdf@gmail.com Generated Indian Mobile Number: 9240784800 { "customerId": "69898cd0ca0b1ef32d4a25b4", "merchantCustomerId": "Z409", "fullName": "john3ab", "emailId": "nairobipalermo78cdf@gmail.com", "phoneNo": "9240784800", "city": "juneau", "zipCode": "99812", "country": "IN", "stateCode": "MH", "successTrans": 0, "createdOn": 1770622160, "lastUpdated": 0, "lastActivity": 1770622160 } Customer created successfully → 69898cd0ca0b1ef32d4a25b4 User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Status = Pass CardNumber = 4111111111111111 CVV = 123 RunFlag = TRUE TestData = IN RouteToMidOrBank = panatics-mid PSP = paynetics MaxAmount = 100 CardholderName = Yash Bahubali Merchant = SuhasM RouteToBankMid = Route to Mid Currency = EUR MinAmount = 10 DefaultAmount = 13.6 PaymentMethod = Visa Expiry = 10/27 select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- EUR select merchant name :- Visa Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 13.6 ✅ Amount within valid range. Using exact value: 13.6 { "sessionUrl": "https://test4.paymentsclub.net/payment-session/69898d01ca0b1ef32d4a25f3/", "brandId": "04199342-5d84-4e17-a53e-5c3d6b03ebd4", "customerId": "69898cd0ca0b1ef32d4a25b4", "sessionId": "69898d01ca0b1ef32d4a25f3", "expiryOn": 1770623109, "createdOn": 1770622209 } Entered Card Holder Name: Yash Bahubali Entered Card Number: 4111111111111111 Entered Card Expiry Date: 10/27 Entered Card CVV: 123 Moved to the Pay button Clicked on the Pay button to proceed with payment Clicked on ZaakPay submit button on bank page Redirect URL → https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true Payment succeeded Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 69898d01ca0b1ef32d4a25f3 Clicked on Search button Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null
